name: Daiquiri Cheesecake Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Mix and pat into bottom and top of pan
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Soften gelatin in a small saucepan with 3/4 cup water.
3. In a bowl, stir egg yolks into sugar until smooth.
4. Add the softened gelatin mixture, lime juice, and rum with rinds to the yolk mixture, stirring constantly over medium heat until thickened and bubbly.
5. Remove from heat and let cool.
6. Beat cream cheese in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
7. Slowly add the cooled gelatin mixture and blend well into the cream cheese.
8. In another bowl, beat egg whites until soft peaks form.
9. Gradually add powdered sugar to the egg whites, continuing to beat until stiff peaks form.
10. Gently fold the whipped egg white mixture into the cream cheese mixture.
11. Whisk whipping cream and gently fold it into the cheesecake batter.
12. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared springform pan.
13. Refrigerate for several hours or overnight before serving.
